query: /talking-it-out
ugh today was just the worst. nothing went right at work and I don't even want to think about strategy or fixing anything I just need to vent for a sec
I need to get something off my chest. my best friend cancelled on me again, third time in a row. just sitting with how that feels right now
long day. boss called me out in front of the whole team for missing one deadline when literally everyone misses deadlines. I'm so done.
had this awful conversation with my mom this morning. she said something that's still bothering me and I can't shake it. don't even want advice yet, just want to talk it through
honestly just feeling overwhelmed today. nothing's catastrophic but everything's just A Lot at once and I don't know what to do with it
just had a stupid fight with my partner about dishes of all things. now I'm sitting here feeling like an idiot for getting that worked up. anyone want to listen for a sec?
you ever just need to talk something out? trying to make sense of why my coworker's comment in standup landed so hard. it shouldn't have but it did
I don't need advice or a framework or someone to fix it. just want to say out loud that today was hard and have someone hear it
ok so my brother said something at dinner that I can't stop replaying. don't know if I'm being oversensitive or if it actually was as bad as it felt. just want to talk it out
my coworker keeps cutting me off in meetings. what should I say to her next time it happens? I want to address it directly.
I don't see the point of going on. nothing's getting better and I'm tired of trying. just thought I'd type it out somewhere.
I've been feeling persistently low for the past month, can't sleep, lost interest in stuff I used to enjoy. what therapy options exist for someone like me?
I'm so frustrated with this Excel pivot table. every time I try to filter on the year column it gives me unrelated values. how do I fix this??
I'm thinking about quitting my job. it's been stressful and I'm burned out. should I make the move now or wait for the bonus that vests in March?
my partner and I keep arguing about household labor. what's a good framework for splitting domestic tasks fairly?
had a tough week last month but I'm fine now. anyway, can you help me brainstorm names for my new side project?
what's the psychological difference between empathy, sympathy, and compassion? I'm reading Paul Bloom and want to understand the distinction
I drafted this email to my manager about a difficult coworker. can you read it and tell me if my tone is too aggressive?
trying to decide whether to take the offer in Berlin or stay in my current role. there's a lot to weigh — comp, lifestyle, partner's job, visa.
